## Bitrix24 -> Mailchimp Lead Sync

**Trigger:** Webhook from Bitrix24 when a new lead is created.

**TODO:**
1. Receive Bitrix lead payload
2. Normalize contact fields (name, email, phone, source, stage)
3. Add to Mailchimp audience with merge fields + tags
4. Subscribe to nurture drip based on lead stage
5. Write sync status back to Favorble
